title: Synovial metaplasia
clinical_details: Tissue removed following removal of breast implant

title: Hibernoma
clinical_details: Breast lump well circumscribed lump 5 x 5 x 4 cm. Uniform deep yellow and lobulated.

title: Malignant phyllodes with fibrosarcomatous stroma
clinical_details: Mastectomy. Well circumscribed tumour, 6 x 4 cm fleshy white and haemorrhagic cut surface.

title: Signet ring carcinoma
clinical_details: Right mastectomy - irregular cream firm area beneath nipple

title: Ductal adenoma/benign adenomyoepithelioma
clinical_details: Excision of old vertical scar and breast lump adjacent and medial to it. Margins of lump macro clear. Excision sutures - short superior, medium medial, long lateral.

title: Fibrocystic changes and secretory changes.
clinical_details: Prophylactic mastectomy. Previous left breast ductal carcinoma

title: Myofibroblastoma
clinical_details: Breast tumour. We received a mastectomy specimen with a large well defined nodular tumour. On section the cut surface was variegated grey/pink. Immunocytochemistry showed patchy desmin and S100 protein positivity. Smooth muscle actin and CD34 were negative.

title: Adenoid cystic carcinoma.
clinical_details: Lump left breast. P3, R4, U5, C5, B5.

title: Mucinous (colloid) carcinoma
clinical_details: Presented with lesion in right breast. On cut surface this demonstrated a circumscribed gelatinous appearance.

title: Diabetic mastopathy
clinical_details: Presented with lump in right breast. Two portions of fibroadipose tissue were received macroscopically, the largest of which measured 5cm in maximal dimension. On cut surface there was evidence of fibrosis.

title: Mucinous carcinoma (breast)
clinical_details: Carcinoma left breast. Specimen: Left Breast. Macro: Left Mastectomy specimen with tumour 9 x 7cm.

title: Adenosquamous carcinoma
clinical_details: Previous history of DCIS. New lesion in right axilla. ?Carcinoma.

title: C3 - atypia - ?papillary lesion

title: Micropapillary adenocarcinoma
clinical_details: Superficial mass in right breast, not attached to skin, microcalcification present - imaging category B. EMA surface positive, CD34 negative. Wide bore needle biopsy of breast - three needle cores of pale tissue up to 10mm in length.

clinical_details: Lump right breast. Has increased in size gradually. Specimen: Right breast lumpectomy. Macro: Pale firm bosselated tissue, 3.5cm.

title: Fibroadenoma

title: Benign breast cyst fluid
clinical_details: Right breast lump. Complex cyst with septation on ultrasound. Breast cyst fluid. 2 cytospins, Pap and MGG

title: Borderline phyllodes tumour
clinical_details: Mobile lump in right breast's upper outer quadrant, 6cm in diameter, confirmed on mammography and ultrasound. Macro: Orientated lumpectomy of breast, 93g, measuring 7 x 4 x 4cm, containing a multilobulated nodule, 6cm in it’s maximum dimension, with a white whorled appearance associated with some haemorrhage. Specimen: Lumpectomy from right breast

title: Benign microcalcification and fibrocystic disease / columnar cell change
diagnosis: Benign microcalcification and fibrocystic disease / columnar cell change
clinical_details: Breast screening patient. Mammotome / Vacuum-Assisted Core Biopsy of 5 mm focus of microcalcification in left upper outer quadrant. Clinical assessment = normal (P1), Radiological assessment = probably benign (R3), Ultrasound assessment = Normal (U1)

title: Invasive mucinous carcinoma
clinical_details: Breast. Left mastectomy. Macro: Circumscribed hard mass 12mm at 2 o'clock.

title: Adenomyoepithelioma
clinical_details: Lump in breast. B3 on core biopsy. P3 clinically.

title: Paget's disease
clinical_details: Right mastectomy for carcinoma. Macro: A mastectomy specimen 25 x 10 x 3cm. The nipple is eroded. Specimen: Nipple

title: Intracystic / encysted papillary carcinoma
clinical_details: Lump in breast noticed 4 weeks earlier. Clinically and radiologically benign. Macro: Wedge of breast tissue 40 x 3.0 x 2.5cm containing an incised soft mass 2.5 x 2.5 x 2.0. Specimen: Cystic mass in breast
